B2B Lead Generation Representative

Location

Egypt; Argentina; Ethiopia; Nigeria; South Africa

Employment Type

Contract

Location Type

Remote

Department

Sales

Compensation

  • $900 – $1,300 per month

Final compensation is set after evaluating experience and location.

OverviewApplication

Autofill from resume

Upload your resume here to autofill key application fields.

Drop your resume here!
Parsing your resume. Autofilling key fields...

Personal Information:

Please provide your contact details and upload any relevant documents to help us assess your qualifications. Ensure all information is complete to move forward in the process.

Please enter your full legal name as it appears on official documents.

The email you provide must be the same one you use to send your video.

Please share your phone number with the country code (e.g., +27 for South Africa, +20 for Egypt, +52 for Mexico). If it works for both WhatsApp and calls, even better.

Boost your chances! Please submit your resume in English and PDF format; otherwise, it will not be considered. Make sure it includes all tools you’ve mastered and fields you’ve worked in.

or drag and drop here

Experience & Availability:

In this section, we’ll gather insights into your technical experience and availability. Please answer the questions based on your expertise and provide your compensation expectations. This will help us assess your fit for the role and ensure we are aligned on expectations.

Briefly share the tools you use, key use cases, any experience with automation, and how AI has improved your efficiency or output.

Select all that apply.

For the second SATA question, it should be something they select. If it is a tool question, please ensure these tools are not repeated in section 3 below. However, prioritize using the client question from the new search thread if possible. In this description, include a statement that says, "Select all that apply."

Your provided rate will be shared with clients. Changing it later may disqualify you. The job description contains the role's budget.

Your provided rate will be shared with clients. Changing it later may disqualify you. The job description contains the role's budget.

Which of the following tools do you excel at? Select all that apply to showcase your expertise!

Select all that apply to showcase your PROVEN expertise. Please answer honestly — we’ll assess skills during the interview process.

Select the tools you are comfortable using to manage projects, assign tasks, or track progress.

Choose the CRM platforms you’re familiar with for managing contacts, tracking sales, and organizing customer data.

Select the tools you’ve used to design, create content, or run marketing campaigns.

Select the programming languages and frameworks you’re skilled in for building and enhancing web applications.

Let’s get to know you! We need you to submit a short video as the first step in our screening and verification process. It’s a great way for us to see your personality, communication style, and why you’re a strong fit for the role.

Submit video here.

If not, you will not be considered.
